summary: 8+ years across the full stack — database infrastructure, test automation, and enterprise frontend engineering.
Self-driven career pivot: from systems-level work to leading frontend architecture at scale, through deliberate upskilling.
Shipped platforms serving 100,000+ users and contributed to products that achieved 15x revenue growth.
Owns the full delivery lifecycle — from architecture decisions and security compliance to team mentorship and hands-on implementation.

highlights.label: Cares about shipping, not just merging
Leaves teams better than he found them
AI-first before it was a talking point

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
bullets: Led frontend architecture and delivery for a micro-frontend platform now serving 100,000+ enterprise users globally, enabling scalable app onboarding and seamless cross-team development.

Delivered four mission-critical features - Workspace Management, User Access Management, Data Ingress, and Infrastructure Health Integration - supporting fully automated infrastructure provisioning and reducing DevOps overhead by ~40%.

Drove security and compliance readiness in under one week, resolving 150+ static analysis issues, all open-source vulnerabilities, and penetration testing findings to meet enterprise review deadlines.
Architected a scalable user analytics solution across the micro-frontend ecosystem, enabling real-time behavioural insights and data-driven product decisions.
Designed and rolled out a centralised Service Registry, reducing onboarding friction and enabling controlled access management across product teams.
Delivered platform training to 300+ organisation members, scaling knowledge and accelerating adoption enterprise-wide.
Mentored frontend and backend engineers through architecture walkthroughs, design reviews, and ongoing technical guidance - improving team velocity and reducing key-person dependencies.
Proactively up-skilled in Next.js and Express.js, contributing to API development and backend discussions.

achievements.title: Spot Awards
achievements.description: For driving product from MVP to market-ready stage within a year

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Drove the entire UI development of a rapidly evolving product as the primary frontend engineer, directly contributing to 15x revenue growth within 4 months through fast, high-quality feature delivery.
Established expertise in React (TypeScript) and GraphQL, becoming the go-to resource for frontend architecture and implementation decisions.
Collaborated with the UX team on a weekly basis, influencing design decisions and ensuring seamless translation of designs into production-ready interfaces.
Built and extended a robust library of reusable UI components, improving development speed and consistency across the product.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Built a project metrics dashboard using Angular, Chart.js, and ApexCharts; contributed enhancements to the open-source ng-apexcharts library on GitHub.
Gained hands-on experience across React, Redux, React Hooks, and Firebase within an agile delivery environment.
Owned UI development, API integration, test automation, and CI/CD infrastructure - becoming a key contributor across the full delivery stack within a year.
Designed and maintained a test automation framework using NUnit and SpecFlow, and configured end-to-end pipelines with Jenkins, Urban Code Deploy, and ReportPortal.

achievements.title: Spot Award
achievements.description: For delivering a critical business feature from POC to market-ready in record time

experience.title: Assistant System Engineer
bullets: Managed and maintained approximately 3,000 SQL Server instances globally for a leading market research firm, ensuring high availability and operational continuity.
Handled backup and recovery operations, SQL Server installations (2008-2016), and production environment configuration.
Built a strong foundation in enterprise data infrastructure that informed future full-stack development work.

achievements.title: Spot Awards
achievements.description: For valuable contribution to migration and upgradation of 1,000+ database servers
